metadata.description: Grimoire — AI-native consulting workspace for the Rattle product configurator (rattleapp.de). Skills, subagents, slash commands, JSON Schemas, and golden I/O examples that teach any AI model how to produce correct, BOM-aware product configurations on the Rattle SaaS platform.

plugins.name: grimoire
plugins.description: Eight Anthropic-format skills (rattle-configurator, rattle-api, rattle-pricelist-analysis, rattle-suggest-config, rattle-document-templates, rattle-apply-config, rattle-audit, rattle-tenant-memory), three subagents (rattle-consultant, rattle-auditor, rattle-config-builder), four slash commands (/rattle-analyse, /rattle-audit, /rattle-suggest-config, /rattle-build-offer), JSON Schemas for every output contract, and golden I/O examples. Encodes the #1 rule, 12 configuration rules, 4 anti-patterns, 6 structural checks, and 7 idempotent ensure_* operation types.
